name: wilyplugin
description: Personal Codex workflow plugin for Wily roadmap, phase, and session management.

interface.shortDescription: Manage large Codex projects with Wily roadmaps and phases.
interface.longDescription: A personal Codex workflow plugin for local-first project roadmaps: initialize per-repo .wily state, split large goals into dependency-aware phases, execute phases through auditable sessions, revise future work without rewriting completed history, and require approval for remote or destructive actions.
defaultPrompt: $wily-init: create a roadmap for this repo
